name: Rodri

current_form.value: 2024 Ballon d'Or winner. Ruptured his ACL in September 2024 (vs Arsenal), missing almost the entire 2024-25 season; returned to first-team action for Man City in April 2025. Back to fitness through 2025-26 but, per analysts, 'has not quite been the same force since' the injury.

fitness.value: Returned to full fitness after the September 2024 ACL rupture. Took a knock in a training-ground collision with Gavi in early June 2026 (finished the session with a slight limp), but initial fears of a tournament-ending injury subsided and he is expected to start the opener.

wc_role.value: Expected first-choice defensive-midfield anchor and one of the first names on De la Fuente's sheet; the spine around which Spain is organised. In Spain's final 26-man squad (announced 2026-05-25). His return from ACL injury is framed as possibly the most important development of Spain's WC campaign.
